title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending Mr. Zac Harvey Gordula for Winning Silver Award at Vanda Science International Competition Last September 5, 2020 and Was Chosen by the Department of Science and Technology (DOST) Region Iv-a As the 2020 Youth Excellence in Science Awardee . (AUTHOR : HON. JOSEPHINE S. EVANGELISTA, 10/12/2020)
